Where vision meets velocity.

We move fast at Halliburton Labs, but we’ll always make time to brag about the companies we’ve accelerated. What those companies are doing isn’t for glory; it’s for good. Our participants take their readiness to scale, novel problem-solving skills, and an unwavering motivation to make change—change that makes a world of difference.

Current Participants

Halliburton Labs participants were selected for their potential, but they were also chosen for what they already have: disruptive ideas, talent, and drive.

Aquafortus

Non-thermal liquid to liquid desalination technology that enables resource recovery from wastewater brine

New Mexico, USA

Nandina Rem

The next evolution of carbon fiber

Singapore

Noon Energy

100+ hour ultra-long duration battery storage

Mountain View, CA

Proof Energy

Fuel agnostics metallic oxide fuel cells

Fremont, CA, USA

Tidal Metals

Decarbonized magnesium from just seawater and electricity

Hamilton, NJ

Sunchem

Precision separations of critical metals

Berkeley, CA,USA

“Our strategy is: Let’s lean in on what we’re good at and then work with the folks  who know how to scale up businesses—like Halliburton Labs—and bring that in from the outside.”

Will Tope
CCO
LINA Energy

“Being a startup is a challenging path. Make sure you’re not the only one doing it. Build a good network around yourself… I need Halliburton’s network to help me with all these aspects of technology building, scaling up, networking, finding partners”

Sahar Sam
Co-Founder and Chief Science Officer
Solaires

“The thing I noticed immediately about Halliburton Labs is a very supportive environment. We’ve done procurement through Halliburton, we’ve gotten manufacturing advice, we’ve talked to chemical experts and adhesive experts all over the world.”

Mark Anderson
Founder and CEO
Icarus RT

“Working with Halliburton, who has established boots on the ground all over the world, allows us access to some of these markets to gain insights, to gain networking, and get a foot in the door in many of these places that we couldn’t otherwise.”

Zach Emond
CEO and Co-Founder
RenewPower

Alumni

Our Alumni are standouts in the climate tech space. They’ve graduated from our program but will always be part of the Halliburton Labs family.
